Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: In this charity showdown, Pro pickleball players and celebs will represent their alma maters and battle it out for the Picklebowl 2023 trophy. Hosted by Heisman Trophy winner and former NFL player turned pickleball enthusiast, Danny Wuerffel.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Video.title: NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

Image.alt: NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)
NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)
NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: Lily Kordic and Kara Williams take on Nathalie Bagby and Natalija Shaw in this Women's Senior Pro Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Two of the sport’s biggest names meet in this Women’s Pro Singles pre-medal match at the 2023 US Open. Parris Todd and Simone Jardim bring elite-level strategy, precision, and intensity to the court in a pivotal semifinal showdown. Who will rise to the challenge and advance?
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal

Video.summary: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Video.summary: Filmed at the US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, this Pro Women’s Doubles matchup features the powerhouse mother-daughter team Leigh and Anna Leigh Waters, known for their aggressive tactics and flawless communication. They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Video.summary: In this US Open 2025 Pro Women's Doubles match, the Waters duo (Anna Lee Waters and Lee Waters) take on Amanda Rosati and Kaitlyn Campbell. The commentators highlight the Waters' dominant performance, particularly Anna Lee's disguised shots and aggressive play, as they secure a swift victory. They also discuss the challenges of the progressive draw format in pickleball and preview Anna Lee Waters' upcoming mixed doubles match with Andre Agassi.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Video.summary: October 4, 2022 - Live from The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health, it's Tuesday Night Pickleball
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles
Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 4 2022 - All-stars Women's Doubles

Video.summary: Watch as Pickleball Pros Dan Granot and Phillip Phillips, paired with NFL legend Brandon Siler and Pickleball professional Ryan Sherry, battle it out in this thrilling Men's Doubles match from the Picklebowl 2022. Filmed in the stunning Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event brings together celebrities and professional athletes representing their alma maters. The game is not only about competition but also raising funds for a great cause, benefiting Desire Street Ministries. With star power from both the sports and entertainment worlds, this exciting match is filled with hard-hitting shots, strategic play, and thrilling moments that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach at the NCPA Virginia Regional 2025, the University of Virginia (UVA) faces off against High Point University in a crucial pool play match. With a bid to the National Championship in St. Louis on the line, these teams battle through a best-of-seven format.The episode kicks off with Women's Singles featuring Alexandra McDonald (UVA) and Sushi Bandaru (High Point), followed by an intense Men's Singles showdown between Eric Lee (UVA) and High Point's wild card, Freddy Ortmann. The action heats up in Men's Doubles with Cooper Duncan joining Ortmann, and Aiden Eggleston partnering with Lee. Watch for strategic mixed doubles play and see if High Point can force a sudden death dreambreaker.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
